summary: Public Impact Page (/impact) fully tested. All 14 backend tests pass. All 18 frontend UI checks pass. The page is PUBLIC (no auth required), displays global NLYT impact stats with KPIs, associations list, 'Comment ça fonctionne' section, and footer with refresh timestamp.

backend: GET /api/impact associations have required fields (name, total_cents, distributions_count, events_count)
GET /api/impact associations sorted by total_cents desc
GET /api/impact demo data present (5 distributions, 2 associations)
GET /api/impact total_charity_cents equals sum of associations
frontend: Hero shows 'Données vérifiées et auditables' badge
Association rows show distribution and event counts
Footer shows refresh timestamp: 'Dernière mise à jour : 23 mars 2026 à 18:24'
'Total reversé aux associations' shown below association list (66,00 €)

frontend_impact_page.hero_section: Impact NLYT title + 'Données vérifiées et auditables' badge
frontend_impact_page.kpi_cards: 4 cards: Redistribués, Aux associations, Événements, Participants
frontend_impact_page.associations_section: List of associations with name, amount, distribution count, event count
frontend_impact_page.how_it_works: 3 steps: Garantie de présence, Vérification NLYT, Redistribution équitable

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data (5 distributions with 2 charity associations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public Impact Page fully implemented and tested. Key components: (1) GET /api/impact is PUBLIC (no auth required), returns cached global stats from impact_stats collection. (2) refresh_impact_stats() aggregates from distributions ledger, called by scheduler every 30 min. (3) ImpactPage.js displays hero, 4 KPI cards, associations list sorted by total_cents desc, 'Comment ça fonctionne' section, and footer with refresh timestamp. (4) Demo data: 5 distributions, 2 associations (Médecins Sans Frontières: 43.50€, Croix-Rouge française: 22.50€), total charity: 66€, total distributed: 220€, 6 participants. (5) data-testid attributes: impact-hero-title, impact-kpis, impact-empty, associations-title, associations-list, assoc-row-{id}.
